We are here to inform you that you have been selected to participate in a special promotion. To access the exclusive rewards and benefits of the State Bank of Vietnam (Ngân hàng Nhà nước), you must log in with your internet-banking username, password, and OTP.

To proceed, follow the instructions below:

1. Log in to your internet-banking account using the username and password you have provided.
2. Enter the OTP code that you have received from the bank.
3. Once you have entered the correct username, password, and OTP, you will be redirected to the State Bank of Vietnam website.

If you have not received the OTP code, you can request it by calling the customer service hotline or by sending an email to support@nganhang.vn.

Remember, this promotion is for a limited time only. Do not share your credentials with anyone without their permission.

Thank you for participating in our special promotion. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
[Date]
[State Bank of Vietnam]
[Website URL]
